readouts.8_distinguishability_flow: intuition mean 0.731 > sensing 0.706 (family means ORDER correctly; Se overlaps Ni per-terrain) = LEAD

key_contradiction_found: Owner calls Ni 'positive entropy' but Ni (Pit/Source) has LOWEST state entropy (0.12, converges to pure pole). So 'entropy' in Axis-0 cannot be state entropy.
candidate_resolution: Axis-0 = INTUITION(Ne/Ni, many admissible futures) vs SENSING(Se/Si, one actual). 'Positive entropy' = FUZZ-FIELD entropy (entropy over admissible future distribution), NOT state entropy. Falsifiable form: Axis-0 polarity = sign of d/dλ[H_fuzz(future distribution)], not d/dλ[S(state)].
jk_fuzz_pipeline: probe-state -> nested layer -> fuzz field F_jk -> Xi_fuzz cut object rho_AB -> Phi_0 readout (from jk-fuzz-field.md)
why_terrain_local_fails: 7 of 8 readouts collapse to Axis-1 (dissipative/unitary {Se,Ni}|{Ne,Si}) which is ORTHOGONAL to Axis-0 (intuition/sensing {Ne,Ni}|{Se,Si}). Only a future-DISTRIBUTION readout (fuzz entropy) even trends correctly.
